name: transport_gated_kd

arm_specs.label: scratch_ce
arm_specs.description: Scratch CE baseline from identical random initialization.

arm_specs.label: uniform_kd
arm_specs.description: Uniform top-k KD control with k=64, T=2.0, gamma=0.5.

arm_specs.label: position_gated_kd
arm_specs.description: Top-k KD with position gate w(i)=(i/L)^2, normalized to unit mean over valid tokens.

arm_specs.label: disagreement_gated_kd
arm_specs.description: Top-k KD with detached per-token disagreement gate proportional to top-k teacher-support KL(teacher||student) (NOT full-vocab; student renormalized inside teacher's top-k), normalized to unit mean.

42.description: Scratch CE baseline from identical random initialization.

7.description: Scratch CE baseline from identical random initialization.

13.description: Scratch CE baseline from identical random initialization.

42.description: Top-k KD with position gate w(i)=(i/L)^2, normalized to unit mean over valid tokens.

42.description: Top-k KD with detached per-token disagreement gate proportional to top-k teacher-support KL(teacher||student) (NOT full-vocab; student renormalized inside teacher's top-k), normalized to unit mean.

13.description: Top-k KD with detached per-token disagreement gate proportional to top-k teacher-support KL(teacher||student) (NOT full-vocab; student renormalized inside teacher's top-k), normalized to unit mean.

summary.verdict: FAIL: no transport-gated arm clears the gated>uniform criterion. Best observed C4-val top1 delta is -0.436 pp with 95% CI [-0.569, -0.330] for position_gated_kd.

ordering_analysis.narrative: Ordering is mixed on C4-val top1: uniform_kd (16.67%) > position_gated_kd (16.24%) > disagreement_gated_kd (15.89%) > scratch_ce (15.66%).

summary.active_ingredient_analysis: Ordering is mixed on C4-val top1: uniform_kd (16.67%) > position_gated_kd (16.24%) > disagreement_gated_kd (15.89%) > scratch_ce (15.66%).

verdict: FAIL: no transport-gated arm clears the gated>uniform criterion. Best observed C4-val top1 delta is -0.436 pp with 95% CI [-0.569, -0.330] for position_gated_kd.
